requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Lesotho has no confirmed published EVSE connector regulation as of 2026-06-14, but its standards and infrastructure direction is expected to follow IEC and South African regional practice. For four-wheel EV charging, this points to IEC 62196-2 Type 2 for AC charging and IEC 62196-3 CCS2 for DC fast charging, consistent with South African public charging infrastructure and imported vehicle inlets. IEC 62196 connector conformity becomes mandatory when written into LSI standards adoption, LEC or LEWA project conditions, tender documents, fleet specifications, or charge-point-operator requirements.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，未能确认莱索托已发布EVSE接口专项法规，但其标准和基础设施方向预计遵循IEC及南非区域实践。对于四轮电动汽车充电，这意味着交流充电采用IEC 62196-2 Type 2，直流快充采用IEC 62196-3 CCS2，与南非公共充电基础设施和进口车辆接口方向一致。当IEC 62196写入LSI标准采纳、LEC或LEWA项目条件、招标文件、车队规范或充电点运营商要求时，即成为强制项目要求。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，未能確認賴索托已發布EVSE接口專項法規，但其標準和基礎設施方向預計遵循IEC及南非區域實踐。對於四輪電動汽車充電，這意味著交流充電採用IEC 62196-2 Type 2，直流快充採用IEC 62196-3 CCS2，與南非公共充電基礎設施和進口車輛接口方向一致。當IEC 62196寫入LSI標準採納、LEC或LEWA項目條件、招標文件、車隊規範或充電點運營商要求時，即成為強制項目要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
South African / IEC regional charging infrastructure practice — Type 2 and CCS2 direction

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. GB/T 20234.2 AC couplers differ from IEC 62196 Type 2 in connector gender, control and proximity signalling, and contact arrangement. GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers are geometrically different from CCS2 and use GB/T 27930 CAN communication, incompatible with CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 and ISO 15118 communication stacks used in IEC-oriented deployments.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器与IEC 62196 Type 2在接口性别、控制/接近导引信号和触点排列上不同。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器与CCS2几何形状不同，并采用GB/T 27930 CAN通信，与IEC方向部署所用的CCS2 / IEC 61851-24和ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器與IEC 62196 Type 2在接口性別、控制/接近導引信號和觸點排列上不同。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器與CCS2幾何形狀不同，並採用GB/T 27930 CAN通訊，與IEC方向部署所用的CCS2 / IEC 61851-24和ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for Type 2 / CCS2 deployment in Lesotho. Conversion requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signalling, DC communication stack, labels, spare parts, temperature-rise evidence, and IEC 62196 test documentation. Adapters are not a substitute for project-compliant connector design. Exporters should confirm the exact connector required by the LEC project, site owner, fleet operator, or tender before quoting.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不适用于莱索托Type 2 / CCS2部署。转换需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈、标签、备件、温升证据及IEC 62196测试文件进行硬件重新设计。转接器不是项目合规接口设计的替代方案。出口商在报价前应确认LEC项目、场地方、车队运营商或招标要求的具体接口类型。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不適用於賴索托Type 2 / CCS2部署。轉換需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧、標籤、備件、溫升證據及IEC 62196測試文件進行硬體重新設計。轉接器不是項目合規接口設計的替代方案。出口商在報價前應確認LEC項目、場地方、車隊運營商或招標要求的具體接口類型。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by LSI adoption, LEC or LEWA project conditions, tender, fleet, site-owner, or CPO specification; physical incompatibility with GB/T makes substitution impossible without hardware redesign
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign, not a paperwork exercise. For Lesotho projects, assume the IEC / South African regional direction: Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC unless the tender states otherwise. GB/T connectors are physically incompatible.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件和协议重新设计，而非文件替换。对于莱索托项目，除非招标另有说明，应按IEC / 南非区域方向处理：交流Type 2、直流CCS2。GB/T接口在物理上不兼容。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬體和協議重新設計，而非文件替換。對於賴索托項目，除非招標另有說明，應按IEC / 南非區域方向處理：交流Type 2、直流CCS2。GB/T接口在物理上不兼容。
